text: ↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: ""The IDF is not preventing rescue forces from reaching the area at this stage,"" You are liars You attacked civilians in Al-Tiri, and violated the ceasefire You attacked a building were the civilians were at You shot at the ambulance moving Farah, who was shot and had a surgery in her head Amal is of unknown fate under the rubble of the building you attacked Red Cross staff had bombs fall on them from a small drone The literal red cross ambulance has bullet holes in it. You'd think when your military has to investigate violations daily, there is something deeply rotten within it
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Mannie's War Room：“‘以色列国防军目前并未阻止救援力量进入该地区。’你们是骗子。你们袭击了 Al-Tiri 的平民，违反了停火协议。你们袭击了平民所在的建筑物。你们向运送 Farah 的救护车开火，她头部中弹并接受了手术。Amal 在你们袭击的建筑物废墟下生死未卜。红十字会工作人员遭到了小型无人机投下的炸弹袭击。真正的红十字会救护车上有弹孔。你会认为，当你们的军队每天都需要调查违规行为时，其内部一定存在严重腐败。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧The IDF said its troops identified two vehicles in southern Lebanon that had departed from a Hezbollah-linked military structure and approached Israeli forces after crossing the Forward Defense Line. The individuals were deemed to be violating ceasefire…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a statement: In response to an Israeli ceasefire violation and a drone strike targeting a car in Tayri, we targeted a command Humvee belonging to the Israeli army in Qantara with an attack drone, achieving a direct hit. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧以色列国防军称，其部队在黎巴嫩南部发现两辆车辆，它们从与真主党有关的军事设施出发，在越过前沿防线后接近以色列军队。这些人被认为违反了停火协议……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发表声明：为回应以色列违反停火协议并用无人机袭击 Tayri 的一辆汽车，我们用攻击型无人机袭击了位于 Qantara 的以色列军队的一辆指挥悍马车，并直接命中。@wfwitness

text: ❗️ In response to the Israeli violation of the ceasefire and attacked a civilian car today in Al-Tiri and killing two civilians Hezbullah attacked with an FPV an Israeli humvee vehicle in the Lebanese town of Al-Qantara
text_zh: ❗️ 为回应以色列违反停火协议并于今日袭击 Al-Tiri 的一辆平民车辆导致两名平民死亡，真主党使用 FPV 无人机袭击了黎巴嫩 Al-Qantara 镇的一辆以色列悍马车。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The IDF said its troops identified two vehicles in southern Lebanon that had departed from a Hezbollah-linked military structure and approached Israeli forces after crossing the Forward Defense Line. The individuals were deemed to be violating ceasefire understandings and posing an immediate threat, prompting an Israeli Air Force strike on one of the vehicles. The structure from which they had departed was also targeted. The IDF said it received reports that two journalists were injured in the strikes, adding that it is not preventing rescue teams from reaching the area and that the incident is under review. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军称，其部队在黎巴嫩南部发现两辆车辆，它们从与真主党有关的军事设施出发，在越过前沿防线后接近以色列军队。这些人被认为违反了停火协议并构成直接威胁，促使以色列空军对其中一辆车辆进行了打击。他们出发的设施也成为了打击目标。以色列国防军表示，已收到两名记者在袭击中受伤的报告，并补充说并未阻止救援队进入该地区，目前该事件正在审查中。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump managed to save AI generated women from death. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普成功拯救了人工智能生成的女性免于死亡。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: NEW: Trump administration is expected to move to reclassify marijuana as soon as Wednesday. Source: Axios
text_zh: 最新消息：预计特朗普政府最早将于周三采取行动，将大麻重新分类。来源：Axios

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 N12: U.S. officials are uncertain about who is making decisions in Iran due to a power struggle between the IRGC and the civilian leadership. The Iranian Supreme Leader Khamenei, is reportedly not communicating with the rest of the leadership, and there is a rift between the negotiating team and the military. A US official noted that there is a complete divide within Iran between the negotiating team and the military, with neither side having full access to the Supreme Leader. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 N12：由于伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队与文职领导层之间的权力斗争，美国官员不确定伊朗目前由谁在做决策。据报道，伊朗最高领袖哈梅内伊没有与其余领导层沟通，谈判团队与军方之间存在分歧。一位美国官员指出，伊朗内部在谈判团队和军方之间存在完全的割裂，双方都无法完全接触到最高领袖。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇫🇷🇺🇳🇺🇸🇮🇱 Photo showcases Israeli gunfire on a Lebanese Red Cross vehicle, despite approval from the mechanism. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 Lebanese Civil Defense sources to Al-Akhbar: The location of journalist Amal Khalil has been identified in the house destroyed by an Israeli airstrike while she was inside with journalist Zainab Faraj, and excavation operations are currently underway to reach her. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇫🇷🇺🇳🇺🇸🇮🇱 照片显示以色列向一辆黎巴嫩红十字会车辆开火，尽管该车辆已获得机制批准。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩民防部门消息人士告诉《Al-Akhbar》：记者 Amal Khalil 的位置已在被以色列空袭摧毁的房屋中确定，当时她与记者 Zainab Faraj 在屋内，目前挖掘工作正在进行中以营救她。@wfwitness

text: Michael A. Horowitz Our blockade is holier than your blockade The Islamic Republic of Iran has welcomed dialogue and agreement and continues to do so. Breach of commitments, blockade and threats are main obstacles to genuine negotiations. World sees your endless hypocritical rhetoric and contradiction between claims and actions. - Masoud Pezeshkian tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 我们的封锁比你们的封锁更神圣。伊朗伊斯兰共和国一直欢迎对话与协议，并将继续这样做。违背承诺、封锁和威胁是进行真正谈判的主要障碍。世界看到了你们无休止的虚伪言论以及主张与行动之间的矛盾。—— 马苏德·佩泽希齐扬推文

text: Open Source Intel Tasnim: Iran’s negotiating team in Islamabad was sent to tell the U.S. talks cover political, military, economic and legal issues only, NOT the nuclear file. As in the last talks in Pakistan, the Iranian negotiators were not allowed to discuss nuclear issues, the main red line from the U.S. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel Tasnim：伊朗在伊斯兰堡的谈判小组被派去告知美国，会谈仅涵盖政治、军事、经济和法律问题，不涉及核档案。正如在巴基斯坦举行的上一次会谈一样，伊朗谈判代表不被允许讨论核问题，这是美国的底线。推文

text: Open Source Intel Peru's Defense and Foreign Ministers resigned after President Balcázar blocked a major F-16 purchase from Lockheed Martin. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047012053391413348/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Ambassador to Turkey Tom Barrack doubles down on his "powerful leadership regimes" remarks, telling Fox News that Western-style democracy "has repeatedly collapsed" in the Middle East and that Gulf monarchies and Erdoğan's have delivered better results.— Fox News https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047011110423773373/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克坚持他关于“强有力的领导政权”的言论，告诉福克斯新闻，西方民主在中东“屡屡崩溃”，海湾君主制国家和埃尔多安的政权取得了更好的成果。—— 福克斯新闻 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047011110423773373/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to the Wall Street Journal, the Pentagon has said that 400 U.S. servicemembers have been wounded in action since the start of the conflict with Iran. Per the report, 271 are from the Army, 64 are from the Navy, 19 are from the Marine Corps, and 46 are from the Air Force. The number of killed in action remains at 13. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据《华尔街日报》报道，五角大楼表示，自与伊朗的冲突开始以来，已有400名美国军人在行动中受伤。根据报告，其中271人来自陆军，64人来自海军，19人来自海军陆战队，46人来自空军。阵亡人数仍为13人。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The moment of interception of a Russian Gerbera long-range reconnaissance UAV with the US-made AGM-114 Hellfire missile over Kyiv earlier today. Possibly, the missile was fired from the V2X Tempest short-range air defense system. The Tempest, developed by US-based defense contractor V2X, was publicly unveiled for the first time in October 2025. The circumstances of the delivery of this SAM system to Ukraine remain unknown at the current moment, though it was suggested that it might have been provided to Kyiv covertly for combat trials before its first public unveiling. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) 今天早些时候，一枚俄罗斯“天竺葵”（Gerbera）远程侦察无人机在基辅上空被美制AGM-114“地狱火”导弹拦截。该导弹可能是从V2X“暴风雨”（Tempest）近程防空系统发射的。由美国国防承包商V2X开发的“暴风雨”系统于2025年10月首次公开亮相。目前尚不清楚该防空系统交付给乌克兰的情况，但有人认为它可能是在首次公开亮相前被秘密提供给基辅进行作战试验的。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack says "real breakthroughs are imminent" on Türkiye's possible return to the F-35 program. - Fox News https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047008959861592073/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克表示，关于土耳其可能重返F-35项目，“真正的突破即将到来”。—— 福克斯新闻 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047008959861592073/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According the Washington Post, citing three sources with knowledge on the matter, the Pentagon has told Congress that Iran may have placed up to 20 naval mines in and around the Strait of Hormuz and that it may take up to 6 months for clearance operations to conclude. Additionally, per the report, it’s unlikely that said operations can be carried out until the end of the conflict with Iran and a long-term ceasefire can be put in place. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据《华盛顿邮报》援引三位知情人士的话报道，五角大楼已告知国会，伊朗可能在霍尔木兹海峡及其周边地区部署了多达20枚海军水雷，清理行动可能需要长达6个月的时间才能完成。此外，根据报告，在与伊朗的冲突结束并达成长期停火协议之前，不太可能进行上述清理行动。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on renewing the sanctions waiver on purchases of Russian oil: Last week was Bank Week, World Bank and IMF Week. On Wednesday, it was my belief we would not do it. I was approached by more than 10 of the most vulnerable and poorest countries in terms of energy, and they asked us to extend that sanction, and it's only for 30 days. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特谈到延长俄罗斯石油购买制裁豁免时表示：上周是银行周，世界银行和国际货币基金组织周。周三时，我认为我们不会这样做。但有超过10个在能源方面最脆弱和最贫穷的国家找到我们，请求我们延长制裁豁免，而且仅延长30天。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @DanLamothe : EXCLUSIVE: It could take six months to fully clear the Strait of Hormuz of mines deployed by the Iranian military, and any such operation is unlikely to be carried out until the U.S. war with Iran ends, the Pentagon has informed Congress — an assessment that means the conflict’s economic impact could extend late into this year or beyond. tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @DanLamothe：独家报道：完全清除伊朗军方部署在霍尔木兹海峡的水雷可能需要六个月的时间，而且在美伊战争结束之前，不太可能进行此类行动。五角大楼已告知国会——这一评估意味着冲突的经济影响可能会持续到今年晚些时候甚至更久。推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Israel has been informed that Trump's new deadline to Iran ends on Sunday, according to Israeli Channel 12. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2047006610946404533/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 快讯 | 据以色列第12频道报道，以色列已获悉特朗普给伊朗设定的新最后期限将于周日结束。https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2047006610946404533/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Iranian President Pezeshkian says that Iran is and will always be open to dialogue and agreements, but will not tolerate breach of commitments or threats. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬表示，伊朗过去、现在和将来都对对话与协议持开放态度，但绝不容忍违背承诺或威胁。@wfwitness

text: Mouin Rabbani | Middle East Expert | Jadaliyya E-Magazine: Turkish & Israeli strategy in Syria is diametrically opposed. Israel wants Syria weak, powerless & defenseless. Türkiye wants a stable Syria with a central government, but one that is friendly to Ankara. Both countries are deeply involved in Syria. So a direct clash, not only between forces they support but perhaps even directly, is entirely plausible. But it remains a big if. FULL INTERVIEW
text_zh: 穆因·拉巴尼 | 中东专家 | Jadaliyya电子杂志：土耳其和以色列在叙利亚的战略截然相反。以色列希望叙利亚虚弱、无力且毫无防备。土耳其希望叙利亚稳定并拥有一个中央政府，但必须是对安卡拉友好的政府。两国都深度介入叙利亚局势。因此，不仅在它们支持的势力之间，甚至可能在两国之间发生直接冲突，都是完全有可能的。但这仍然是一个巨大的未知数。完整采访

text: Peru’s Defense and Foreign Ministers—Carlos Díaz and Hugo de Zela—quit after President José María Balcázar halted a major F-16 purchase from Lockheed Martin. The president said an interim government shouldn’t approve such a deal.
text_zh: 秘鲁国防部长卡洛斯·迪亚斯（Carlos Díaz）和外交部长雨果·德·泽拉（Hugo de Zela）在总统何塞·玛丽亚·巴尔卡萨尔（José María Balcázar）叫停了一项从洛克希德·马丁公司购买F-16战斗机的重大交易后辞职。总统表示，过渡政府不应批准此类交易。

text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack on his strong leadership remarks in the Middle East: When I said that ‘powerful leadership regimes,’ whether benevolent monarchies or the kind of monarchical republics seen elsewhere in the region, are the only structures that have actually worked in the Middle East, I was speaking from decades of hard-earned observation, not ideology. Imported models have repeatedly collapsed. Look at the track record. Countries that tried to adopt Western-style democracy quickly after the Arab Spring largely failed, often descending into chaos, civil war or new forms of authoritarianism. Meanwhile, stable, results-oriented leadership in places like the Gulf monarchies has delivered security, economic growth, modernization and real improvements in people’s lives. Türkiye, operating as a presidential republic with regular multiparty elections, also demonstrates how strong, centralized leadership under President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan has delivered stability, economic dynamism and assertive regional influence, though critics have described it as a hybrid regime with strong authoritarian tendencies. This is not a change in U.S. policy away from supporting democratic governance and human rights. It is a realistic assessment of what produces stability so that human rights and prosperity can take root. Source: Fox News
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克（Tom Barrack）就其在中东的强力领导言论表示：当我提到“强有力的领导政权”，无论是仁慈的君主制还是该地区其他地方所见的君主制共和国，都是中东地区唯一真正行之有效的结构时，我是在基于数十年的艰苦观察，而非意识形态。外来模式已多次崩溃。看看过往记录吧。那些在“阿拉伯之春”后迅速试图采用西方民主制度的国家大多失败了，往往陷入混乱、内战或新型威权主义。与此同时，像海湾君主国这样稳定且注重成果的领导层带来了安全、经济增长、现代化和人民生活的真正改善。土耳其作为一个实行定期多党选举的总统制共和国，也展示了在雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安总统领导下，强有力的中央集权领导如何带来了稳定、经济活力和果断的地区影响力，尽管批评者将其描述为具有强烈威权倾向的混合政权。这并非美国政策从支持民主治理和人权转向。这是对什么能产生稳定从而使人权和繁荣得以扎根的现实评估。来源：福克斯新闻

text: Former European Council Chief Charles Michel publicly countered Ursula von der Leyen after she referenced Turkish influence alongside Russia and China. Michel highlighted Türkiye as a core NATO ally, energy hub, and migration partner, calling for realism in EU policy. The exchange triggered debate across Europe.
text_zh: 前欧洲理事会主席查尔斯·米歇尔（Charles Michel）在乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩（Ursula von der Leyen）将土耳其的影响力与俄罗斯和中国相提并论后，公开反驳了她。米歇尔强调土耳其是北约的核心盟友、能源枢纽和移民合作伙伴，呼吁欧盟政策保持现实主义。这次交流在欧洲引发了辩论。

text: A new investigation by the Conflict Insights Group says Colombian mercenaries, backed by the UAE, helped Sudan’s RSF capture El-Fasher in October 2025. The fighters operated drones, trained RSF units, and supported the siege. Phone-tracking data links them from Colombia to a UAE military facility and then into Sudan. The report says this support was critical to the assault and may tie the network to war crimes and crimes against humanity. Source: BBC
text_zh: 冲突洞察小组（Conflict Insights Group）的一项新调查显示，在阿联酋的支持下，哥伦比亚雇佣兵帮助苏丹快速支援部队（RSF）于2025年10月占领了法希尔。这些武装人员操作无人机、训练RSF部队并支持围攻。电话追踪数据将他们从哥伦比亚连接到阿联酋的一个军事设施，随后进入苏丹。报告称，这种支持对袭击至关重要，并可能将该网络与战争罪和反人类罪联系起来。来源：BBC

text: Michael A. Horowitz The US has informed Israel that the ceasefire with Iran is only extended until Sunday, according to Israeli media tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨（Michael A. Horowitz）：据以色列媒体推文称，美国已通知以色列，与伊朗的停火协议仅延长至周日。

text: Open Source Intel South Korea's Foreign Ministry special envoy met with Iranian FM Araghchi. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047005636269900146/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：韩国外交部特使会见了伊朗外长阿拉格希（Araghchi）。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047005636269900146/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Israel has been informed that Trump's new deadline to Iran ends on Sunday — Channel 12 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv：突发新闻——据第12频道推文，以色列已获悉特朗普给伊朗设定的新最后期限将于周日结束。

text: Open Source Intel REPORT: Pakistan pushing to restart U.S.-Iran talks despite Iran's seizure of two cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz. PM Sharif met Iran's ambassador Wednesday. A second round of negotiations could come within days, officials say. - NYT tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：报道：尽管伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡扣押了两艘货船，巴基斯坦仍在推动重启美伊谈判。总理谢里夫周三会见了伊朗大使。官员们表示，第二轮谈判可能在几天内进行。——《纽约时报》推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 MTV on negotiations between Lebanon and Israel: The meeting between Lebanon and Israel, with the participation of Rubio, will take place tomorrow at 4:00 PM Washington time, which corresponds to 11:00 PM Beirut time. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 MTV关于黎巴嫩与以色列谈判的报道：黎巴嫩与以色列的会议将在卢比奥的参与下于华盛顿时间明天下午4:00举行，即贝鲁特时间晚上11:00。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Rep. David Scott (D-GA) dead at 80. He is the 5th House member to die in office since January 2025. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047002591460995370/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：美国众议员大卫·斯科特（David Scott，民主党，佐治亚州）去世，享年80岁。他是自2025年1月以来第5位在任内去世的众议院议员。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047002591460995370/photo/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @RALee85 : "The U.S. military has introduced Ukrainian counter-drone technology in recent weeks at a key U.S. air base in Saudi Arabia, according to five people with knowledge of the matter, as it seeks to stem attacks that have destroyed aircraft and buildings, and killed at least one service member. The deployment of a Ukrainian command-and-control platform called Sky Map at Prince Sultan Air Base, which has not previously been reported, is a sign of how Ukraine’s military has surged ahead in drone and counter-drone technologies that have been battle-hardened in its four-year war with Russia." https://www.reuters.com/business/aerospace-defense/us-turns-ukrainian-counter-drone-tech-after-iran-attacks-sources-say-2026-04-22/ tweet
text_zh: ELINT News：转发 @RALee85：“据五位知情人士透露，美国军方最近几周在沙特阿拉伯的一个关键美军基地引入了乌克兰的反无人机技术，旨在遏制那些摧毁了飞机和建筑物并造成至少一名军人死亡的袭击。此前未曾报道的名为‘天空地图’（Sky Map）的乌克兰指挥控制平台在苏丹王子空军基地的部署，标志着乌克兰军队在与俄罗斯长达四年的战争中经受过实战考验的无人机和反无人机技术方面取得了突飞猛进的发展。” https://www.reuters.com/business/aerospace-defense/us-turns-ukrainian-counter-drone-tech-after-iran-attacks-sources-say-2026-04-22/ 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW: President Trump has set a new deadline for Iran to present a unified proposal by Sunday. - N12 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：最新消息：特朗普总统已为伊朗设定了新的最后期限，要求其在周日前提交一份统一提案。——N12推文

text: OSINTdefender Amidst the stalled U.S.-Iran talks, U.S. President Donald J. Trump has said that at the request of the U.S., the 8 women protesters, who were set to be executed by Iran tonight, will not have their sentences carried out. Per President Trump, 4 of them will be released immediately and the other 4 will be sentenced to one month in prison. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：在美伊谈判陷入僵局之际，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普表示，应美国的要求，原定于今晚被伊朗处决的8名女性抗议者将不会被执行死刑。据特朗普总统称，其中4人将立即获释，另外4人将被判处一个月监禁。推文

text: ELINT News RT @mhmiranusa : Sentinel-2 satellite image today shows what looks like a flotilla of IRGCN fast attack crafts sailing north of strait of Hormuz near Kargan coast. At least 33 boats can be seen in what looks like a show of force enforcing the strait closure by Iran. Geo-location: 26.899,56.824 https://twitter.com/mhmiranusa/status/2046957671421551095/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News：转发 @mhmiranusa：今天的哨兵-2号（Sentinel-2）卫星图像显示，在霍尔木兹海峡以北靠近卡尔甘（Kargan）海岸的地方，似乎有一支伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军（IRGCN）的快速攻击艇编队正在航行。可以看到至少33艘船只，这似乎是在展示武力，以执行伊朗对海峡的封锁。地理位置：26.899,56.824 https://twitter.com/mhmiranusa/status/2046957671421551095/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: Very good news! I have just been informed that the eight women protestors who were going to be executed tonight in Iran will no longer be killed. Four will be released immediately, and four will be sentenced to one month in prison. I very much appreciate that Iran, and its leaders, respected my request, as President of the United States, and terminated the planned execution. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：特朗普：非常好的消息！我刚刚获悉，原定于今晚在伊朗被处决的八名女性抗议者将不再被杀害。四人将立即获释，四人将被判处一个月监禁。我非常感谢伊朗及其领导人尊重我作为美国总统提出的请求，并终止了计划中的处决。感谢你们对此事的关注！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Israel’s N12 News, U.S. President Donald J. Trump has set a new deadline for Iran to come with a unified proposal for this upcoming Saturday, April 25. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047000188695302539/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据以色列N12新闻报道，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普已为伊朗设定了新的最后期限，要求其在即将到来的4月25日星期六之前拿出一份统一提案。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047000188695302539/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated A Russian soldier is filming the site of a strike. He says that many of his guys have died. Well, it doesn't matter, at least their relatives have probably already gone to collect the payout. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047000044721574105/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：一名俄罗斯士兵正在拍摄袭击现场。他说他的许多战友已经死了。好吧，没关系，反正他们的亲属可能已经去领取赔偿金了。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047000044721574105/video/1 推文

text: Faytuks News There is no way to reach an agreement unless there is a dramatic concession from either the US or Iran, according to Israeli assessments -N12 "Given this state of affairs, Israel views a military scenario as highly likely." Israel has been informed that Trump's new deadline to Iran ends on Sunday -N12 - Faytuks News tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News：据以色列评估，除非美国或伊朗做出重大让步，否则不可能达成协议。——N12 “鉴于这种状况，以色列认为军事方案极有可能发生。” 以色列已获悉特朗普给伊朗设定的新最后期限将于周日结束。——N12 - Faytuks News推文

text: Faytuks News Israel has been informed that Trump's new deadline to Iran ends on Sunday -N12 בישראל עודכנו: הדד-ליין שהציב טראמפ לאיראנים - עד יום ראשון הקרוב - החדשות - N12 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News：以色列已获悉特朗普给伊朗设定的新最后期限将于周日结束。——N12 以色列已更新：特朗普给伊朗人设定的最后期限——本周日之前——新闻——N12 推文

text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack on Türkiye & its possible F-35 purchase: Calling the prolonged impasse "insane" is blunt common sense. Türkiye remains a vital ally. Russia benefits from the wedge between the U.S. and Türkiye. Sanctions and exclusion from the F-35 program, triggered by the S-400 purchase, have strained ties unnecessarily while Russia benefits from the wedge. Let me be explicit: any resolution will fully satisfy Section 1245 of the NDAA. That means verifiable cessation of possession and operability of the Russian S-400 system, with formal certifications from the secretaries of Defense and State confirming there is no risk of compromise to sensitive F-35 technology. There will be no shortcuts on American security standards. Real breakthroughs are imminent. Source: Fox News
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克（Tom Barrack）就土耳其及其可能购买F-35战机一事表示：称长期僵局为“疯狂”是直率的常识。土耳其仍然是一个至关重要的盟友。俄罗斯从美国和土耳其之间的隔阂中获益。因购买S-400而引发的制裁和被排除在F-35项目之外，不必要地加剧了关系紧张，而俄罗斯却从中获益。让我明确一点：任何解决方案都将完全满足《国防授权法案》（NDAA）第1245条的要求。这意味着可核查地停止拥有和操作俄罗斯S-400系统，并由国防部长和国务卿正式证明不会对敏感的F-35技术造成泄密风险。在美方安全标准上不会有捷径。真正的突破即将到来。来源：福克斯新闻

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 Contrary to what was reported earlier the Lebanese Red Cross has recovered one of the journalist while the other journalist Amal Khalil remains missing. While the Lebanese Red Cross was recovering the bodies of the two people that were killed in…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 🇺🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Photo showcases Israeli gunfire on a Lebanese Red Cross vehicle, despite approval from the mechanism. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 与早先报道的情况相反，黎巴嫩红十字会已找到其中一名记者，而另一名记者阿迈勒·哈利勒（Amal Khalil）仍然下落不明。在黎巴嫩红十字会打捞两名遇难者遗体时……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 🇺🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 照片显示，尽管已获得机制批准，以色列军队仍向黎巴嫩红十字会车辆开火。@wfwitness

text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack on Israel & Hezbollah: Everybody has been equally untrustworthy. We have never trusted Hezbollah. You cannot eliminate an embedded militia solely by kinetic means. Pure ‘mowing the lawn’ has never worked. Endless war is idiocy, we need enforceable outcomes. Source: Fox News
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克（Tom Barrack）谈及以色列与真主党：各方同样不可信。我们从未信任过真主党。你无法仅通过军事手段消灭一支根深蒂固的民兵组织。单纯的“割草”策略从未奏效。无休止的战争是愚蠢的，我们需要可执行的成果。来源：福克斯新闻

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WaPo: U.S. officials have warned that clearing sea mines in the Strait of Hormuz could take up to six months, highlighting a major obstacle to reopening one of the world’s most critical shipping routes. Iran may have deployed dozens of mines using small boats and GPS-guided methods, making them difficult to detect and remove. The prolonged presence of mines means that even if a ceasefire holds, commercial shipping and energy flows could remain disrupted for months, keeping pressure on global oil and gas markets. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华盛顿邮报》：美国官员警告称，清除霍尔木兹海峡的水雷可能需要长达六个月的时间，这凸显了重新开放全球最关键航运路线之一所面临的重大障碍。伊朗可能已利用小型船只和GPS制导方式部署了数十枚水雷，使其难以被发现和清除。水雷的长期存在意味着，即使停火协议达成，商业航运和能源流动仍可能中断数月，从而持续给全球石油和天然气市场带来压力。@wfwitness

text: 📝 Бои у Гришино 📝 На южном фланге Добропольского направления бойцы ГВ «Центр» расширяют зону контроля в окрестностях Гришино . Днем 21 апреля поступили данные о полной зачистке от противника территории села. Тем не менее его окраины все еще находятся в «серой зоне», а закрепиться на них российские войска смогут лишь после окончательной ликвидации вклинения противника в районе трассы М-30. ➡️ В то же время на центральном участке направления обстановка остаётся напряженной. Наиболее тяжелые столкновения идут в окрестностях бывшей шахты «Запорожская» и шахты «Нововодянская №2» , куда противник регулярно отправляет малые пехотные группы для сдерживания продвижения ВС РФ. В то же время штурмовики «Центра» пока не могут переломить ход боёв ввиду обилия дронов ВСУ, препятствующих организации стабильного снабжения в «серой зоне» у шахт. ➡️ На северном фланге направления бойцы предпринимают попытки закрепиться на территории Нового Донбасса , однако сталкиваются с аналогичными проблемами. Уверенного контроля над разрушенным селом пока нет ни у одной из сторон. Обстановка на рубеже Новое Шахово — Торецкое — Павловка пока остается без изменений. Активность обеих сторон на этом участке относительно низкая из-за второстепенности участка. 📌 После зачистки вклинения у трассы М-30 и уверенного закрепления в Белицком ВС РФ смогут приступить к формированию флангового охвата Доброполья с нескольких сторон. Контроль над городом, в свою очередь, необходим российским войскам для дальнейшего продвижения на север оккупированной части ДНР. Если у Вас есть дополнения по обстановке, Вы хотите, чтобы мы подсветили успехи Вашего подразделения, — Вы всегда можете написать нам в бот обратной связи @rybar_feedback_bot 📍 Карта в высоком разрешении 📍 English version 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #дайджест #Доброполье #карта #Россия #Украина ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 格里希诺（Grishino）附近的战斗 📝 在多布罗波利耶（Dobropolye）方向的南翼，俄军“中央”集团军的士兵正在扩大格里希诺周边的控制区。4月21日白天有消息称，该村庄领土已完全清除敌军。然而，其郊区仍处于“灰色地带”，俄军只有在彻底消除敌军在M-30公路区域的楔入点后，才能在这些地区站稳脚跟。 ➡️ 与此同时，该方向中心地段的局势依然紧张。最激烈的冲突发生在原“扎波罗热”矿井和“新沃季扬斯卡娅2号”矿井周边，敌军定期派遣小型步兵小组前往此处以阻滞俄军推进。与此同时，“中央”集团军的突击部队由于乌军无人机数量众多，阻碍了在矿井附近“灰色地带”组织稳定的补给，目前尚无法扭转战局。 ➡️ 在该方向的北翼，士兵们正试图在“新顿巴斯”领土上站稳脚跟，但遇到了类似的问题。目前双方均未对该被摧毁的村庄实现稳固控制。新沙霍沃（Novoye Shakhovo）—托列茨科耶（Toretskoye）—巴甫洛夫卡（Pavlovka）一线的局势目前保持不变。由于该地段处于次要地位，双方在此处的活动相对较低。 📌 在清除M-30公路附近的楔入点并稳固控制别利茨科耶（Belitskoye）后，俄军将能够开始从多个方向对多布罗波利耶形成侧翼包围。反过来，控制该市对于俄军进一步向顿涅茨克人民共和国（DNR）被占领地区的北部推进至关重要。如果您有关于局势的补充信息，或者希望我们报道您所在部队的战绩，您可以随时通过反馈机器人 @rybar_feedback_bot 给我们留言。 📍 高清地图 📍 英文版 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #摘要 #多布罗波利耶 #地图 #俄罗斯 #乌克兰 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text_zh: 🇺🇸 这是一个精神分裂症模拟器，可以让你了解特朗普在日常生活中的体验。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Senator Graham spoke with U.S. President Trump and Secretary of War Hegseth this morning. He reports that Trump’s decision to leave the blockade in place is very smart and that he expects it to stay in place until Iran shows they’re committed to changing their ways. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国参议员格雷厄姆（Graham）今天上午与美国总统特朗普和战争部长海格塞斯（Hegseth）进行了交谈。他报告称，特朗普决定维持封锁是非常明智的，并预计在伊朗表现出致力于改变其行为之前，封锁将一直持续。@wfwitness

text: Pakistani officials say they still hope to restart talks between the United States and Iran, despite new tensions after Iran seized two cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz. Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met Iran’s ambassador on Wednesday, and officials believe a second round of negotiations could take place within days. Source: NYT
text_zh: 巴基斯坦官员表示，尽管伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡扣押了两艘货船导致局势再度紧张，但他们仍希望重启美国与伊朗之间的谈判。巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫周三会见了伊朗大使，官员们认为第二轮谈判可能会在几天内举行。来源：纽约时报

text: Someone get his schizophrenia pills 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 谁去给他拿点精神分裂症药吧 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
